newAgent.fromFriendDescription: Bring in an agent someone shared with you, from a file or a link.

flagged: Houston flagged this one for a closer look.

step1.title: What should we export?
step1.body: Pick what goes into the copy. The agent's instructions always come along.
step1.noInstructions: This agent has no instructions yet.

step2.title: Want to anonymize first?
step2.body: Houston can remove personal info like names, emails and paths. You'll see exactly what changed before saving.
step2.asIsBody: Keep everything exactly the way it is.
step2.anonymizeBody: Remove names, emails, companies, API keys and other personal details.
step2.workingProgress: Houston is reviewing your content ({{done}} of {{total}} done).
step2.slowNotice: This is taking longer than usual. You can keep what's ready and finish the rest the quick way.
step2.aiToggleHint: When this is on, your AI also looks for personal details that are easy to miss, like names or company names. When it's off, Houston only removes obvious things like emails, links, and keys. Either way, you review every change before sharing.
step2.aiFallback: Houston couldn't use AI for this pass ({{reason}}). Only obvious patterns like emails and paths were removed, so review the results carefully.
step2.becameEmpty: Almost everything got redacted. You can leave this out instead.

step3.title: Ready to export
step3.body: Houston packages {{name}} into a single file you can send through any app. Whoever gets it imports their own copy. Live collaboration lives in Share.

review.title: Ready to share
review.body: Send {{name}} as a file, or publish it to the Agent Store for anyone to install.

import.flagged: Houston flagged this one for a closer look.

step1.title: Bring in an agent someone shared
step1.body: Open a file they sent, or paste a share link. Houston reads it and shows you what is inside before anything is installed.
step1.scanChoiceLabel: Should Houston take a quick look?
step1.scanYesBody: Houston scans for obvious risks. Not a guarantee, just a careful read.
step1.scanFlagged: Houston flagged {{count}} item(s). Review them as you continue.

step2.title: Name your new agent
step2.body: Pick a name and a color. You can change either one later.

step3.title: Pick which skills to bring along

step4.title: Pick which routines to bring along
step4.body: Routines run on a schedule. They wait until their integrations are connected.

step5.title: Pick which learnings to keep
step5.body: Learnings are notes the agent uses as background context. Personal items can be left out.

step6.title: The agent needs a few apps
step6.body: Connect them now from the connections page, or skip and connect later.
step6.none: Nothing to connect. Your agent is ready.
step6.connectLater: Routines that need a missing app wait until you connect it.

link.label: Install from a link
link.placeholder: Paste a share link, like https://agents.gethouston.ai/a/agent
link.hint: Paste the link someone gave you. Houston fetches the agent so you can review it before installing.

errors.invalid: That does not look like a valid agent link.
errors.notFound: We could not find a published agent at that link.
errors.unreadable: That agent could not be read. Ask the person who shared it to publish it again.
errors.network: We could not reach the Agent Store. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong fetching that agent. Please try again.

listing.title: List {{name}} on the Agent Store
listing.body: Tell people what this agent does. You can change any of this later from the manage page.
listing.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this agent do, and who is it for?
listing.taglinePlaceholder: One short line that sums it up
listing.tagsPlaceholder: Add a tag and press Enter
listing.tagsFull: That's the most tags you can add
listing.creatorNamePlaceholder: How you want to be credited

share.title: {{name}} is on the Agent Store
share.body: Share this link so anyone can install your agent.
share.unlistedNote: Your listing is unlisted for now, so only people with the link can find it. Ask for a public spot anytime from the manage page.

manage.title: {{name}} is published
manage.body: Your agent is live on the Agent Store. Share the link, update the listing, or take it down.
manage.updateHint: Updating re-runs the same pick and anonymize steps, so you choose exactly what goes out.
manage.removeConfirmBody: {{name}} will no longer be installable from its link. You can publish it again later.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

codes.cannotPublishArchived: This listing was archived, so it can't be published again. Create a new listing to share this agent.
codes.invalidCreator: Add your name before publishing so people know who made this agent.
codes.conflictingOps: Another change is still saving. Wait a moment, then try again.
codes.slugExhausted: We couldn't find an available link for this name. Try a different name.
codes.rateLimited: You're doing that a little too fast. Wait a moment, then try again.
codes.secretsDetected: This agent looks like it still has a password or key inside. Remove it, then try again.
codes.notFound: This listing couldn't be found. It may have already been removed.
